narrative:
Spring Valley township has 1,995 registered voters, with 44.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.6 percentage points.
